title: ID Analyzer Scan Request
description: Request schema for the ID Analyzer /scan endpoint. Initiates a full KYC identity document scan with optional biometric face verification.

document.description: Front of identity document image. Accepts a URL, base64-encoded image, local file path, or cache reference (ref:...).

documentBack.description: Back of identity document image (URL, base64, file path, or cache reference).

face.description: Selfie face photo for biometric verification (URL, base64, file path, or cache reference).

faceVideo.description: Selfie face video for liveness detection (URL, base64, or file path). Used if face is not provided.

profile.description: KYC Profile ID or preset profile name.

profileOverride.description: Per-request profile configuration overrides applied on top of the base profile.

verifyName.description: Full name to cross-check against the document data.

verifyDob.description: Date of birth to verify in YYYY/MM/DD format.

verifyAddress.description: Address to cross-check against the document.

verifyPostcode.description: Postal/ZIP code to cross-check against the document.

verifyDocumentNumber.description: Document or ID number to cross-check against the document.

restrictCountry.description: Comma-separated ISO ALPHA-2 country codes. Reject documents not issued by these countries.

restrictState.description: Comma-separated US/CA state names or abbreviations. Reject documents not issued by these states.

restrictType.description: Accepted document types: P=Passport, D=Driver License, I=Identity Card.

contractGenerate.description: Comma-separated contract template IDs (up to 5) for automatic document generation on scan completion.

contractFormat.description: Output format for auto-generated contract documents.

contractPrefill.description: Key-value pairs used to prefill dynamic fields in contract templates.

ip.description: User IP address for country cross-check. Uses HTTP connection IP if omitted.

customData.description: Arbitrary string stored alongside the transaction (e.g. internal customer reference).

client.description: Client library identifier, set automatically by official SDKs.
